description: Frontend-only tool that converts a YouTube URL into a downloadable 1080x1920 Instagram Story image using the oEmbed API and Canvas API.

userStories.title: Project scaffold
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Vite + TypeScript project with CSS files separated from components, Vitest configured with coverage, and a clean folder structure so the team has a solid foundation to build on.
acceptanceCriteria: Vite project created with React + TypeScript template
Vitest configured with @vitest/coverage-v8, coverage threshold set to 80% in vitest.config.ts
src/ structure contains: components/, hooks/, utils/, types/
Each component directory contains a .tsx file and a co-located .css file — no inline styles
package.json scripts include: dev, build, test, coverage
npm run dev, npm run build, npm run test, and npm run coverage all exit without errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Types and shared type definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need shared TypeScript types defined in one place so that all utility modules and components reference the same interfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: src/types/index.ts exports OEmbedData interface with fields: title (string), author_name (string), thumbnail_url (string)
src/types/index.ts exports StoryData interface with fields: title (string), channelName (string), thumbnailUrl (string), videoId (string)
src/types/index.ts exports Template interface with fields: id (string), name (string), render (function signature: (ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, data: StoryData) => Promise<void>)
No runtime logic in types/index.ts — types only
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: YouTube URL validation utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an extractVideoId utility that parses a YouTube URL and returns the video ID so that other modules can rely on a validated ID.
acceptanceCriteria: src/utils/youtube.ts exports extractVideoId(url: string): string | null
Returns the video ID for youtube.com/watch?v=ID format
Returns the video ID for youtu.be/ID format
Returns the video ID for youtube.com/shorts/ID format
Returns null for an empty string
Returns null for a non-YouTube URL
Returns null for a malformed URL
Unit tests in src/utils/youtube.test.ts cover all cases above
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: oEmbed metadata fetch utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a fetchOEmbed utility that calls the YouTube oEmbed endpoint and returns typed metadata so that components can display video info without an API key.
acceptanceCriteria: src/utils/oembed.ts exports fetchOEmbed(videoUrl: string): Promise<OEmbedData>
Calls https://www.youtube.com/oembed?url=<videoUrl>&format=json
Returns an OEmbedData object with title, author_name, and thumbnail_url on success
Throws an Error with a descriptive message on non-200 HTTP responses
Throws an Error with a descriptive message on network failure
Unit tests in src/utils/oembed.test.ts mock global fetch and cover: success response, 404 response, and network error
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Download utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a downloadCanvas utility that converts a canvas to a file and triggers a browser download so that users can save their Story image.
acceptanceCriteria: src/utils/download.ts exports downloadCanvas(canvas: HTMLCanvasElement, format: 'png' | 'jpeg', filename: string): void
For format 'png', calls canvas.toDataURL('image/png')
For format 'jpeg', calls canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.92)
Creates a temporary <a> element, sets href to the data URL, sets download attribute to filename, clicks it, and removes it
Unit tests in src/utils/download.test.ts mock canvas.toDataURL and document.createElement and assert correct MIME type and filename for both formats
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Templates constant and render functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a TEMPLATES constant that defines three visually distinct Story templates with their render functions so that the preview and selector components can use them.
acceptanceCriteria: src/utils/templates.ts exports TEMPLATES as an array of Template objects
TEMPLATES contains exactly 3 entries with unique ids: 'dark', 'light', 'gradient'
Template 'dark': black background, thumbnail centered, title and channel overlaid at bottom with semi-transparent scrim
Template 'light': white background, thumbnail in upper half, title in dark text below, channel name in muted gray, 'Watch on YouTube' CTA badge
Template 'gradient': blurred thumbnail fills full 9:16 frame, fixed purple-to-black gradient overlay, title in bold white text centered
Each template's render function accepts (ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, data: StoryData) and returns Promise<void>
src/utils/renderer.ts exports renderTemplate(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, data: StoryData, templateId: string): Promise<void> that delegates to the matching template's render function
Unit tests in src/utils/templates.test.ts verify all template IDs are unique and all required fields (id, name, render) are present
Unit tests in src/utils/renderer.test.ts mock the canvas context and assert drawImage and fillText are called for each template
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: UrlInput component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to paste a YouTube URL into an input field with validation feedback and a clear button so that I know immediately if my URL is valid.
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/UrlInput/UrlInput.tsx renders a text input, a Submit button, and a Clear button
Submit button is disabled when input is empty
Inline error message is shown below the input when the URL is invalid (on blur or on submit attempt)
Error message clears when the user modifies the input
Clicking Clear resets the input value and clears any error
onSubmit prop is called with the validated URL when a valid URL is submitted
Component CSS lives in src/components/UrlInput/UrlInput.css — no inline styles
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: TemplateSelector component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see thumbnail previews of all available templates and click one to select it so that I can pick the style I prefer.
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/TemplateSelector/TemplateSelector.tsx renders one preview card per template in TEMPLATES
Each card displays the template name and a small 9:16 aspect-ratio placeholder preview
The selected template's card has a visible highlight (border or ring)
Clicking a card calls the onSelect prop with the template id
Component CSS lives in src/components/TemplateSelector/TemplateSelector.css — no inline styles
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: StoryPreview component with canvas rendering
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a live canvas preview of my Instagram Story rendered with the selected template so I can confirm it looks right before downloading.
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/StoryPreview/StoryPreview.tsx renders a <canvas> element at 1080x1920 logical pixels
Canvas is visually scaled down via CSS to max-width: 270px while preserving 9:16 aspect ratio
When storyData and templateId props are provided, renderTemplate is called and the canvas updates
When storyData is null, a placeholder message is shown instead of the canvas
Re-renders when templateId prop changes
Thumbnail image is loaded with crossOrigin set to 'anonymous' before being drawn
Component CSS lives in src/components/StoryPreview/StoryPreview.css — no inline styles
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: DownloadBar component
userStories.description: As a user, I want two download buttons (PNG and JPEG) that are disabled until a preview is ready so that I can save my Story image in my preferred format.
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/DownloadBar/DownloadBar.tsx renders 'Download PNG' and 'Download JPEG' buttons
Both buttons are disabled when the canvasRef prop has no current canvas element
Clicking 'Download PNG' calls downloadCanvas with format 'png' and filename yt-story-<videoId>.png
Clicking 'Download JPEG' calls downloadCanvas with format 'jpeg' and filename yt-story-<videoId>.jpeg
Component CSS lives in src/components/DownloadBar/DownloadBar.css — no inline styles
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: App composition and useStoryBuilder hook
userStories.description: As a user, I want all components wired together in a single-page app so that submitting a URL, selecting a template, previewing, and downloading all work end to end.
acceptanceCriteria: src/hooks/useStoryBuilder.ts manages state: videoUrl, storyData, selectedTemplateId, isLoading, error
useStoryBuilder exposes handleSubmit(url) which calls fetchOEmbed and maps the result to StoryData
useStoryBuilder exposes handleTemplateChange(templateId) to update selectedTemplateId
src/App.tsx composes UrlInput, TemplateSelector, StoryPreview, and DownloadBar using useStoryBuilder
Loading spinner shown in App while isLoading is true
Error banner shown in App when error state is non-null
App.css contains page-level layout styles — no inline styles in App.tsx
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: README with API documentation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a README that explains how to run the project and documents the public utility API so I can understand and extend the tool.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md includes project overview section
README.md includes prerequisites (Node version, npm)
README.md includes install, dev, build, test, and coverage commands
README.md documents extractVideoId with signature, parameters, return value, and example
README.md documents fetchOEmbed with signature, parameters, return value, and example
README.md documents renderTemplate with signature, parameters, and example
README.md documents downloadCanvas with signature, parameters, and example
README.md includes a CORS note explaining crossOrigin='anonymous' workaround for canvas thumbnail drawing
README.md includes a screenshot placeholder (e.g., docs/screenshot.png path noted)
Typecheck passes
